assignments.name: Assign_to_Phase_Tracker_Record_Collection
assignments.label: Assign to Phase Tracker Record Collection

decisions.name: Are_there_six_total_phase_tracker_records
decisions.label: Are there six total phase tracker records?

Flow.description: Button on the Total Project Baseline Phase Tracker record allows users to refresh this Baseline and all other related child Phase Tracker records to ensure they're up to date with the correct information.
Flow.label: GMS - Phase Tracker Refresh

loops.name: Loop_through_Completed_Approved_Phase_Baselines
loops.label: Loop through Completed & Approved Phase Baselines

loops.name: Loop_through_Completed_Approved_Submitted_Phase_Baselines
loops.label: Loop through Completed, Approved & Submitted Phase Baselines

recordLookups.name: Get_all_related_Phase_Tracker_Records
recordLookups.label: Get all related Phase Tracker Records

recordLookups.name: Get_Cumulative_Completed_Phase_Tracker_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Cumulative Completed Phase Tracker Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Cumulative_Including_Approved_Phases_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Cumulative Including Approved Phases Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Cumulative_Including_Submitted_Phases_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Cumulative Including Submitted Phases Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Most_Recent_Submitted_Phase_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Most Recent Submitted Phase Request

recordLookups.name: Get_Most_Recently_Submitted_Phase_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Most Recently Submitted Phase Request

recordLookups.name: Get_Phase_Baseline_from_Phase_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Phase Baseline from Phase Request

recordLookups.name: Get_Total_Project_Baseline_Phase_Tracker_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Total Project Baseline Phase Tracker Record

fields.name: refreshtrackertext
fields.fieldText: Would you like to refresh all the Phase Tracker records?

screens.name: Unable_to_Refresh_all_Phase_Tracker_Records
screens.label: Unable to Refresh all Phase Tracker Records

fields.name: Copy_1_of_refreshtrackertext
fields.fieldText: I'm sorry, you don't currently have all the correct phase tracker records in order to complete a refresh. Please check that all child tracker records are related to the correct "Parent Tracker".
